CheckTitle: Linode Cloud Firewall outbound rules are configured
Description: Linode Cloud Firewalls are checked to determine whether outbound rules are explicitly configured.
Risk: When outbound rules are not configured, egress filtering behavior will not be enforced.

Code.Other:
1. Log in to the Linode Cloud Manager
2. Navigate to Firewalls
3. Select the associated firewall
4. Click Add an Outbound Rule in the Rules tab

Recommendation.Text: Configure outbound rules to explicitly control allowed egress destinations and protocols.
